title: Po_core po_trace_blocked v1
description: PR-014 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Represents a semantic step / decision path / trace fragment that was diverted from the normal output path (safety block, suppression, deferred reconstruction/jump, rejected path, unresolved contradiction, viewer disagreement) and preserved as a future reactivation candidate. This is NOT a deletion log: Po_trace_blocked is an evolution-resource substrate, not an audit trash bin. Recording never executes reactivation, never bypasses the safety gate, and never rewrites content. See docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_BLOCKED_CONTRACT_V1.md.

source_event_id.description: The Po_trace event (e.g. SemanticProfileComputed or PoSelfDecisionMade) this blocked trace originated from.

pressure_snapshot.description: Deterministic snapshot of the pressures observed at block-time (open key set, e.g. max_priority_score, max_viewer_pressure, jump_pressure). Every value is normalized 0..1.

reactivation_eligibility.description: Whether this blocked trace meets the deterministic reactivation-candidate score threshold. This flag is metadata only -- it never triggers automatic reactivation (docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_BLOCKED_CONTRACT_V1.md).

reactivation_score.description: Deterministic seed score (mean of pressure_snapshot values) estimating future reactivation worth. Never used to auto-reactivate in this PR.

status.description: PR-014 seed runtime only ever creates status='blocked'. The remaining states are reserved for future controlled modes and are never set by this PR's runtime (see docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_BLOCKED_CONTRACT_V1.md).
